name: Avengers
teaser: Play with a reduced number of characters in your deck, but with a cast of six power-5 characters with useful abilities, and each associated with a unique action with two abilities.
mechanics: Play with a reduced number of characters in your deck, but with a cast of six power-5 characters with useful abilities, and each associated with a unique action that has two abilities, a regular one and a stronger one when the right character is in play.

name: Hydra
teaser: Destroy your characters to play a bunch of low-power characters and gain various other benefits.
mechanics: Destroy your characters to play a bunch of low-power characters and gain various other benefits.

name: Kree
teaser: Play extra actions, draw actions and gain great power from playing several actions on the same turn.
mechanics: Play extra actions, draw actions and gain great power from playing several actions on the same turn.

name: Masters of Evil
teaser: Fulfill the varied objectives of your cards to gain victory points outside base scoring and get benefits from having a lot of victory points.
mechanics: Fulfill the varied objectives of your cards to gain victory points outside base scoring and get benefits from having a lot of victory points.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D.
teaser: Play extra characters on the same base and get power boosts for having/playing characters on the same base.
mechanics: Play extra characters on the same base and get power boosts for having/playing characters on the same base.

name: Sinister Six
teaser: Play base modifiers, reduce the breakpoint of bases and gain advantages from bases with low breakpoints.
mechanics: Play base modifiers, reduce the breakpoint of bases and gain advantages from bases with low breakpoints.

name: Spider-Verse
teaser: Play with cards that can be played either normally, or as Specials during base scoring but with weaker effects.
mechanics: Play with cards that can be played either normally, or as Specials during base scoring but with weaker effects.

name: Ultimates
teaser: Move your characters around, trigger abilities that activate on movement and converge your characters to the same base to gain great power.
mechanics: Move your characters around, trigger abilities that activate on movement and converge your characters to the same base to gain great power.
